title: GIFT-seq: Gapfill and Library Preparation Protocol
author: Nabih Maslah

steps.title: Probe preparation for addition to probe hybridization
steps.instruction: Probe preparation for addition to probe hybridization.

steps.title: If using individual oligos ordered in tubes
steps.instruction: If using individual oligos ordered in tubes: Resuspend all oligos to 100 µM in IDTE pH 8. 1 Liter IDTE pH 8.0 (1X TE Solution) Integrated DNA Technologies, Inc. (IDT) Catalog #11-05-01-09 Create an intermediate pool at 3200 nM per probe.

steps.title: The 10x Genomics GEM-X Flex Gene...
steps.instruction: The 10x Genomics GEM-X Flex Gene Expression Reagent Kits User Guide (CG000786, CG000787, CG000788, CG0007889) is performed according to the standard workflow and manufacturer’s instructions. For GIFT-seq / Gapfill reaction , additional necessary steps are outlined below.

steps.title: If using oPools
steps.instruction: If using oPools: Resuspend each 50 pmol scale oPool in 31.25 µL for 1600 nanomolar (nM), per probe .

steps.title: Primers required
steps.instruction: Primers required: Forward primer - TruSeq Read 1: 5'-CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT-3' Reverse primer - TruSeq Read 2: 5'-GTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTG-3' Standard desalting (HPLC purification isn't required) Should be supplied in IDTE (or low EDTA TE Buffer)

steps.title: See GitHub repository https://github
steps.instruction: See GitHub repository https://github.com/clareaulab/probeset_design_pipeline for probes design and guidelines. Gapfill probe sequences LHS Probe: 5'-GTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGCTCTTCCGATCT-25N-3' TruSeq Read 2 handle (For PCR enrichment and indexing) mRNA targeting sequence (25N) RHS Probe: /5Phos/-25N-ACGCGGTTAGCACGTA-NN-8N-CGGTCCTAGCAA-3' mRNA targeting sequence (25N) Constant Sequence Probe barcode 8 bases long Partial capture sequence 1 Truncated version: /5Phos/-25N-8N-CGGTCCTAGCAA-3'

steps.title: On day 2, Gapfill is performed...
steps.instruction: On day 2, Gapfill is performed after the post-hybridization (Post-Hyb) washes and before encapsulation. Optional. For FFPE samples do one more Post-Hyb wash.

steps.title: Thaw and keep spike-in / custom probes On ice
steps.instruction: Thaw and keep spike-in / custom probes On ice . Combine probe panels or individual probes to probe working concentration of 533.3 nanomolar (nM), per probe . Important: Probe working solutions should be prepared fresh (Same day).

steps.title: During step 1 of "Probe Hybridization"...
steps.instruction: During step 1 of "Probe Hybridization" (see one of 10x Genomics GEM-X Flex Gene Expression User Guides) add desired custom probes (at working concentration): 3 µL, if doing GEM-X V1 for a final concentration of 32 nanomolar (nM), per probe .

steps.title: Incubate for 16-24 hours at 42...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 16-24 hours at 42 °C in a thermal cycler or a thermometer with heated lid and no shaking (per protocol instructions).

steps.title: Prepare and keep Post-Hyb Resuspension Buffer...
steps.instruction: Prepare and keep Post-Hyb Resuspension Buffer B On ice , from 10x Genomics User Guide except supplemented by RNase Inhibitor. Regardless of 10x Genomics Flex protocol, prepare as follows for: 1 sample: Water 475 µL + conc. Post-Hyb buffer B 25 µL + RNase Inhibitor 2.5 µL (Final conc. 0.2 U/µL) 2 samples: Water 950 µL + conc. Post-Hyb buffer B 50 µL + RNase Inhibitor 5 µL (Final conc. 0.2 U/µL) 4 samples: Water 1900 µL + conc. Post-Hyb buffer B 100 µL + RNase Inhibitor 10 µL (Final conc. 0.2 U/µL)

steps.title: When washes are completed, each sample...
steps.instruction: When washes are completed, each sample should be resuspended in 250 µL of Post-Hyb Resuspension Buffer B (Step 8.1, similar to 10x Genomics protocol but with RNase Inhibitor).

steps.title: While performing washes, start preparing buffers...
steps.instruction: While performing washes, start preparing buffers for the Gapfill reaction: Buffer should be prepared On ice . All components should be completely thawed and no precipitates should be visible. A B C D E F 1 Reagent Cat. No. Final Conc. in Gapfill reaction 1X + 10% 2X + 10% 4X + 10% 2 Water, nuclease-free -- -- 62.71 125.42 250.84 3 Betaine B0300 1M 22 44 88 4 10X Thermopol Buffer B9004S 0.5X 5.5 11 22 5 10X Isothermal Amplification Buffer II B0374S 0.5X 5.5 11 22 6 10X T4 DNA Ligase Buffer B0202S 0.05X 0.55 1.1 2.2 7 Deoxynucleotide (dNTP) Solution Mix N0447S/N0447L 50 µM 0.55 1.1 2.2 8 Total, µL: 96.81 193.6 387.2 Gapfill Buffer Mix

steps.title: Gapfill Reaction Mix should be prepare On ice
steps.instruction: Gapfill Reaction Mix should be prepare On ice . A B C D E F 1 Reagent Cat. No. Final Conc. 1X + 10% 2X + 10% 4X + 10% 2 Gapfill Buffer (from step 9) -- -- 96.8 193.6 387.2 3 Sulfolobus DNA Polymerase IV M0327S 0.07 units/µL 3.85 7.7 15.4 4 T4 DNA Ligase M0202T/M0202M 150 units/µL 8.25 16.5 33 5 RNase Inhibitor 3335402001 0.4 U/µL 1.1 2.2 4.4 6 Total, µL: 110 220 440 Gapfill Reaction Mix Protector RNase Inhibitor Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3335402001

steps.title: Filter sample with 30 µm filter to new 1
steps.instruction: Filter sample with 30 µm filter to new 1.5 mL Protein LoBind tube. Pre-Separation Filters (30 µm) (Sample Filter, Miltenyi Biotec, 130-041-407)

steps.title: Determine cell concentration using available cell counter
steps.instruction: Determine cell concentration using available cell counter.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Aliquot between 100,000 - 120,000 cells into 0
steps.instruction: Aliquot between 100,000 - 120,000 cells into 0.5 or 1.5 mL Protein LoBind tube. Plates can be used instead if centrifuge with swinging bucket plate adaptor is available. Do not exceed 120,000 cells per gap fill reaction. Otherwise perform multiple reactions.

steps.title: Centrifuge 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Gapfill reaction is performed in a...
steps.instruction: Gapfill reaction is performed in a thermocycler with lid set at 37 °C: 25 °C 00:10:00 . 37 °C 00:20:00 . 4 °C Hold.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 100 µL of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 100 µL of Gapfill Reaction Mix (Step 10) . Transfer to PCR tubes or P96 plate if necessary.

steps.title: When thermocycler reaction is finished, add...
steps.instruction: When thermocycler reaction is finished, add 150 µL of Post-Hyb Resuspension Buffer B in each well. Pipette mix 5x. Then transfer to 0.5 or 1.5 mL Protein LoBind tubes if necessary for subsequent steps.

steps.title: Centrifuge 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 850 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Remove 235 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Remove 235 µL of the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 36
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 36.7 µL of Post-Hyb Resuspension Buffer B. Cells / nuclei could be filtered again after Gapfill to avoid clumping and eventual clogging (Resuspend in 150 µL and filter through 30 µm filter).

steps.title: Estimate cell / nuclei concentration with...
steps.instruction: Estimate cell / nuclei concentration with a cell counter and pool samples if necessary according to 10x Genomics recommendations.

steps.title: Then proceed immediately to 10x Genomics Flex GEM encapsulation
steps.instruction: Then proceed immediately to 10x Genomics Flex GEM encapsulation.

steps.title: Supplement Pre-Amp Mix with 50 µM...
steps.instruction: Supplement Pre-Amp Mix with 50 µM TruSeq Read 2 Reverse primer 2.0 µL, for 1X rxn or 8.8 µL, for 4X + 10% for final conc. of 1 µM in Pre-Amp Mix + sample from step 4.1 of "Post-GEM Incubation - Recovery" (see one of 10x Genomics GEM-X Flex Gene Expression User Manuals).

steps.title: Add 2 additional cycles to Pre-Amp reaction
steps.instruction: Add 2 additional cycles to Pre-Amp reaction. Note. Decrease cycle number for indexing PCR of WTA Library by 1-2 cycles to avoid overamplification.

steps.title: Continue with cleanup outlined in step 4
steps.instruction: Continue with cleanup outlined in step 4.3 "DNA Cleanup - SPRIselect" (see one of 10x Genomics GEM-X Flex Gene Expression User Manuals). Stopping point. Store at 4 °C, for = or -20 °C, for = .

steps.title: Prepare Gapfill PCR master mix On ice
steps.instruction: Prepare Gapfill PCR master mix On ice . A B C D E F G 1 Reagent Cat. No. Final Conc. 1X 1X + 10% 2X + 10% 4X + 10% 2 Amp Mix or Amp Mix C 2000047 or 2001311 -- 50 55 110 220 3 Fwd primer: TruSeq Read 1 (100 µM stock) -- 1 µM 1.0 1.1 2.2 4.4 4 Rev primer: TruSeq Read 2 (100 µM stock) -- 1 µM 1.0 1.1 2.2 4.4 5 Water, nuclease-free -- -- 28 30.8 61.6 123.2 6 Total, µL: 80 88 176 352 Gapfill Feature PCR master mix

steps.title: Take 20 µL of clean pre-Amp...
steps.instruction: Take 20 µL of clean pre-Amp product (Step 20) and mix it with 80 µL Gapfill Feature PCR master mix. Thoroughly pipette mix and briefly centrifuge.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler with the following protocol
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler with the following protocol. A B C 1 Lid Temperature Volume Run Time 2 105 °C 50 µL ~30 min 3 Step Temperature Time (mm:ss) 4 1 98 °C 00:45 5 2 98 °C 00:20 6 3 63 °C 00:30 7 4 72 °C 01:00 8 5 Go to step 2, 9x (Total 10x) 9 6 72 °C 01:00 10 7 4 °C Hold Gapfill Feature PCR thermal cycler protocol

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend the SPRIselect reagent
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend the SPRIselect reagent. Add 180 µL SPRIselect Reagent (1.8X) to each sample. Pipette mix 15x (Pipette set to 180 µL).

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature .

steps.title: With the tube still in the...
steps.instruction: With the tube still in the magnet, add 300 µL 80% ethanol to the pellet. Wait 30 sec. Remove the ethanol.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant. DO NOT discard any beads.

steps.title: Place on the magnet High until the solution clears
steps.instruction: Place on the magnet High until the solution clears. Higher bead quantity takes longer to settle.

steps.title: With the tube still in the...
steps.instruction: With the tube still in the magnet, add 200 µL 80% ethanol to the pellet. Wait 30 sec. Remove the ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge briefly and place on the magnet Low
steps.instruction: Centrifuge briefly and place on the magnet Low .

steps.title: Transfer 30
steps.instruction: Transfer 30.6 µL to a new tube strip.

steps.title: Place on the magnet Low until the solution clears
steps.instruction: Place on the magnet Low until the solution clears.

steps.title: Remove any remaining ethanol
steps.instruction: Remove any remaining ethanol. DO NOT let the sample dry to ensure maximum elution efficiency.

steps.title: Remove from the magnet
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnet. Add 31 µL Buffer EB. Pipette mix 15x. Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086

steps.title: Incubate 00:02:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:02:00 Room temperature .

steps.title: Add 50 µL of Amp Mix...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of Amp Mix (PN-2000047) or Amp Mix C (PN-2001311) to each clean Gapfill Library (Step 37) . Use the whole volume of Gapfill Library. Optional. After optimization less amount of Gapfill Feature PCR product can be used and leftovers may be stored at -20 °C for up to 4 weeks. In reaction add water to a total volume of 80 µL.

steps.title: Add 20 µL of an individual...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of an individual Dual Index TT Set A (PN-300431) to each sample. Pipette mix 5x (pipette set to 90 µL). Centrifuge briefly.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler with...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler with the same protocol as used for indexing the Flex Gene Expression library. Determine cycle number based on 10x Genomics User Guide. A B C 1 Lid Temperature Volume Run Time 2 105 °C 100 µL ~25-40 min 3 Step Temperature Time (mm:ss) 4 1 98 °C 00:45 5 2 98 °C 00:20 6 3 54 °C 00:30 7 4 72 °C 00:20 8 5 �Go to step 2, determine cycle number. 9 6 72 °C 01:00 10 7 4 °C Hold Note. For whole transcriptome library reduce 1-2 cycles as pre-amp cycle number was increased.

steps.title: Continue to Post Sample Index PCR Cleanup
steps.instruction: Continue to Post Sample Index PCR Cleanup . Stopping point. Store at 4 °C, for = or -20 °C, for = .

steps.title: Vortex to resuspend the SPRIselect reagent
steps.instruction: Vortex to resuspend the SPRIselect reagent. Add 80 µL SPRI select Reagent (0.8X) to each sample. Pipette mix 15x (Pipette set to 180 µL).

steps.title: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:05:00 Room temperature .

steps.title: Place on the magnet High until the solution clears
steps.instruction: Place on the magnet High until the solution clears.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant. DO NOT discard any beads.

steps.title: With the tube still in the...
steps.instruction: With the tube still in the magnet, add 200 µL 80% ethanol to the pellet. Wait 30 sec. Remove the ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge briefly and place on the magnet Low
steps.instruction: Centrifuge briefly and place on the magnet Low .

steps.title: Repeat step 46 for a total of 2 washes
steps.instruction: Repeat step 46 for a total of 2 washes.

steps.title: Remove any remaining ethanol
steps.instruction: Remove any remaining ethanol. DO NOT let the sample dry to ensure maximum elution efficiency.

steps.title: Remove from the magnet
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnet. Add 41 µL Buffer EB. Pipette mix 15x. Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086

steps.title: Incubate 00:02:00 Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:02:00 Room temperature .

steps.title: Place on the magnet Low until the solution clears
steps.instruction: Place on the magnet Low until the solution clears.

steps.title: Transfer 40
steps.instruction: Transfer 40.6 µL to a new tube strip.

steps.title: Stopping point
steps.instruction: Stopping point. Store at 4 °C, for = or -20 °C, for = for long-term storage.

steps.title: Continue to Gapfill Feature PCR cleanup
steps.instruction: Continue to Gapfill Feature PCR cleanup . Stopping point. Store at 4 °C, for = or -20 °C, up to 1 week .

steps.title: Continue to Sample Index PCR - Gapfill library
steps.instruction: Continue to Sample Index PCR - Gapfill library . Stopping point. Store at 4 °C, for = or -20 °C, for = .

steps.title: Sequencing can be done together with Flex WTA libraries
steps.instruction: Sequencing can be done together with Flex WTA libraries. Sequencing read lengths options: Read 1: 48, i7 index: 10, i5 index:10, Read 2: 50. Read 1: 28, i7 index: 10, i5 index:10, Read 2: 90. Based on gap length used, Read 2 should be increased if full probe should be captured in first case or to capture probe barcode in second case. Number of reads for Gapfill library can be estimated based on formula: 100 * num of probes * num of cells = required num of reads PhiX used 9% but can be variable based on other libraries in the same pool.

steps.title: Post Library Construction quality control
steps.instruction: Post Library Construction quality control. Run 1 µL sample at 1:20 dilution on an Agilent TapeStation High Sensitivity D1000 tape. Expected peak size 250-260 .
